sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO C_YZD_EQUIPMENT_T (companyid,equipmentname,makecompany,equipmentbrand,equipmenttype,equipmentpower,buydate, useyear,usestatus,purpose,usestate,leasecompany,lesseecompany,sellcompany,buycompany, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($companyid$,$equipmentname$,'$makecompany$','$equipmentbrand$','$equipmenttype$','$equipmentpower$','$buydate$', '$useyear$','$usestatus$','$purpose$','$usestate$','$leasecompany$','$lesseecompany$','$sellcompany$','$buycompany$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(id) from c_yzd_equipment_t where validflag > 0
companyid = $companyid$
equipmentname = $equipmentname$
(makecompany like '%$makecompany$%')
(equipmentbrand like '%$equipmentbrand$%')
buydate = '$buydate$'
usestatus = '$usestatus$'
usestate = '$usestate$'

select a.*,b.basicName as emsg from c_yzd_equipment_t a left join sys_basic_msg_t b on a.equipmentname = b.id where a.validflag > 0
a.companyid = $companyid$
a.equipmentname = $equipmentname$
(a.makecompany like '%$makecompany$%')
(a.equipmentbrand like '%$equipmentbrand$%')
a.buydate = '$buydate$'
a.usestatus = '$usestatus$'
a.usestate = '$usestate$'
order by a.id
select a.*,b.basicName as emsg from c_yzd_equipment_t a left join sys_basic_msg_t b on a.equipmentname = b.id where a.validflag>0 and a.ID = $id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_YZD_EQUIPMENT_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE ID = $id$
